ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measure */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the measure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measure */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., %) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measure was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measure was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_periods" (
  "time_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time period */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period (e.g., 2002/06) */,
  "time_type" TEXT /* Type of time period (e.g., 5-year rolling average) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the time period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the time period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnicities" (
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity (e.g., All ethnic groups) */,
  "ethnicity_type" TEXT /* Type of ethnicity (e.g., ONS 2011 5+1) */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Population size of the ethnicity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic location */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location (e.g., England and Wales) */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of geographic location (e.g., country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., survey, traffic camera) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value */,
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measure */,
  "time_period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time period */,
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ethnicity */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic location */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measure */,
  "value_type" TEXT /* Type of value (e.g., %) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_values_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_id") REFERENCES measures ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_values_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity_id") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_values_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES geographic_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_values_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_values_time_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_period_id") REFERENCES time_periods ("time_period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data validation rule */,
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measure */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of validation rule (e.g., range check, consistency check) */,
  "rule_definition" TEXT /* Definition of the validation rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_id") REFERENCES measures ("measure_id")
)
column_names: Timestamp when the measure was created
Timestamp when the measure was last updated
Unique identifier for each time period
Type of time period (e.g., 5-year rolling average)
Start date of the time period
End date of the time period
Unique identifier for each geographic location
Unique identifier for each data source
Type of data source (e.g., survey, traffic camera)
Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst)
Unique identifier for each data validation rule
Type of validation rule (e.g., range check, consistency check)
